headline: 17 days to garlic harvest — check for heat-advanced browning.
weather_notes: Skip all irrigation through Monday — zones ran this morning and Sunday-night storm chances will maintain soil moisture into a clear Monday.
Resume zone 1 and zone 2 by Tuesday morning — 80°F arrives dry with no rain in the 7-day outlook; first scheduled run after the weekend gap.
Check w2 and w3 garlic leaf browning before Tuesday's warmup — last week's 95–99°F peak may have pulled the July 15 harvest window forward by 1-2 weeks.

suggested_tasks.title: Inspect c1 beans: support and pod set
suggested_tasks.description: Good Mother Stollard is a pole bean at 56 days — now in early pod set with no log since May 13; confirm trellis support is in place before vines sprawl further.
